system.description: As a Main Action, accept 1 System Strain and alter your molecular composition to be slightly out of tune with mundane reality. Until the start of your next turn, you can move at your normal movement rate in any direction, passing through solid objects. You cannot affect or be affected by mundane matter or energy while phased. If you re-materialize while fully or partially embedded in something else, you are ejected into the nearest space that can contain you. Both you and the object you intersected take 1d6 damage per character level you possess.

activation.duration: until the start of your next turn
